heroTitle: Turn Your Unused Items Into Cash
heroSubtitle: Connect with expert resellers who handle everything — from pricing to shipping. Whether it's a watch, a bike, electronics, or more — you earn, they sell.
featuresSubtitle: We connect sellers with trusted, local resale experts who do the hard work for you — across all categories of valuables.
featureExpertDesc: Expert resellers evaluate, price, and list your items — watches, bikes, electronics, instruments, and more — on the best platforms for maximum return.
featureMatchingDesc: Get matched with a local resale expert based on your location and the type of items you want to sell.
featureEarningsDesc: Track every item from pickup to sale. See exactly what you earn with our clear commission structure.
stepsSubtitle: From unused items to cash in just a few steps. Our experts handle the rest.
step1Desc: Tell us about your items — watches, bicycles, electronics, gear, and more — your preferred service type, and your location.
step2Desc: A verified resale expert near you picks up and evaluates your valuables in person.
step3Desc: Your reseller lists items on premium platforms. You get paid when they sell.
testimonial1: I sold my old bike and a vintage watch and made over 800 euros without lifting a finger. My reseller was professional, friendly, and got great prices.
testimonial2: As a reseller, this platform gives me a steady stream of quality items across many categories and handles all the logistics. I've grown my business 3x.
testimonial3: The transparency is amazing. I can see exactly where each item is in the process and what I'll earn. Highly recommend!
ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of sellers and resellers on Sellzy. Turn your unused valuables into money today.
sellerDesc: I have clothes to sell and want expert help.
resellerDesc: I'm a resale expert looking for items to sell.

profileTypeHint: Choose your profile type to get started
marchandOptionDesc: I want to fulfill requests from sellers
termsSection1Content: By using Sellzy, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree with any of these terms, please do not use our service.
termsSection2Content: Sellzy is a platform connecting clothing sellers with expert resellers. We facilitate the resale process by providing management, tracking, and communication tools.
termsSection3Content: To use Sellzy, you must create an account. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your login information and all activities performed under your account.
termsSection4Content: The standard commission is 80% for the seller and 20% for the reseller on each sale. Payments are processed after both parties confirm the sale.
termsSection5Content: Sellers must provide accurate descriptions of their items. Resellers must handle items with care and list them at fair prices. Any fraudulent behavior will result in account suspension.
termsSection6Content: Sellzy acts as an intermediary and is not responsible for direct transactions between sellers and resellers. We do not guarantee the sale of items.
termsSection7Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be informed of important changes by email or notification in the application.
photoGuideImages: Item photos — JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, max 10MB each
certificateGuideImages: Authenticity certificates or receipts — images or PDF, max 5MB each
reviewOrUploadDocs: Review items or upload requested documents
allDocumentsAndAgreements: All documents and agreements associated with your account.
documentRequestMessage: 📄 I'd like to request additional documentation for "%s". Please upload authenticity certificates, purchase receipts, or any relevant documents.
yourResellersDocumentRequest: Your reseller is requesting additional documentation for "%s".
feeStructureSellerDesc: Understand how earnings are split when your items sell
feeStructureMarchandDesc: See the fee tiers that apply to your reselling work
earningsCalculatorDesc: Enter an item price to see the projected earnings split
noActiveTierForPrice: No active fee tier covers this price range.
adminNeedsConfigureFeeTiers: An admin needs to configure fee tiers first.
finalizeItemListDesc: This will lock the item list and notify the seller to review and approve or decline items. You will no longer be able to add, edit, or remove items after this action. An agreement will be automatically generated once some items are approved, or you can generate it manually after the seller responds.
agreementBothSigned: Both parties have signed the agreement.
agreementWaitingOtherParty: Waiting for the other party to sign.
agreementOtherPartySigned: The other party signed — your signature is needed.
agreementPleaseReviewAndSign: Please review and sign the agreement to proceed.
documentsRequestedDesc: The reseller has requested documents for the following items. Please upload them in the item's document section below.
removeDocumentDesc: "{{fileName}}" will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
